scope.assignment: Custom role or temporary built-in fallback at subscription scope
scope.resource_group_path: Resource-group scoping is the target for future hardening, but role assignment and provider registration checks currently keep subscription scope explicit.
scope.tenant_assumption: Service principal is created in the active tenant and used for Azure Resource Manager deployment.

conditions.reason: Role assignment write/delete remains broad in thesis-demo-v1 because Terraform assigns Digital Twins, IoT Hub, Grafana, and storage access during deployment.

known_gaps.reason: Read wildcard remains a documented thesis-demo-v1 gap because Azure provider operation discovery and Terraform read paths are broader than the create/update paths.
Some setup operations and role assignments are still validated at subscription scope. Resource-group-only scoping is deferred to least-privilege-v2.

provider_validation: Review 3-cloud-deployer/docs/references/azure_custom_role.json against current Azure provider operations before supervised role creation.
verification.live_smoke: Run only during supervised cloud validation; default automated tests must not mutate Azure.
